sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46727" key="h(du/frwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡδῠ´-φρων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46727.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sweet-minded,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
